addressNotFoundError: Error: We could not find the address you are looking for. Please check the address and try again.
assetTransferWarning: This transaction is visible only in the list of transactions for the source address. Displaying it in the destination address's list of transactions is not supported yet in the current version.
assetsRichListDesc: The assets rich list shows the top holders of each asset.
assetsRichListInvalidAssetOrIssuer: Error: Invalid issuer address and/or asset name. Please check the URL parameters.
destinationFilterHint: For smart contract transactions, this is the contract address, not the final token recipient.
endTickTooLarge: End tick value is too large.
errorLoadingPrice: Error: Failed to load price. Please refresh the page or try again later.
errorMessage: Beta - Data may be incomplete or erroneous
eventsBetaDisclaimer: This feature is in development. Only recent data is included and may be purged until a production-ready version is available. The API endpoints used are subject to change in upcoming releases.
exchangesLoadFailed: Error: Failed to load exchanges. Please refresh the page or try again later.
invalidAddressError: The address format is invalid. Please check the address and try again.
invalidDateRange: Start date must be less than end date
invalidRangeAmount: Min amount must be less than or equal to max amount
invalidRangeInputType: Min value must be less than or equal to max value
invalidTickRange: Start tick cannot be greater than end tick
invalidTransactionId: Invalid ID format. Please check the transaction ID and try again.
lastNTickQualityTooltip: Percentage of non-empty ticks in the last 10K ticks, regardless of epoch
latestStatsLoadFailed: Error: Failed to load latest stats. Please refresh the page or try again later.
loadingTransactionsError: Error: Something went wrong while loading transactions. Please try again later.
maxAmountTooLarge: Max amount value is too large.
maxInputTypeTooLarge: Max input type value is too large.
maxResultsHint: Results are limited to {{count}}. Use filters to narrow down the list.
minAmountTooLarge: Min amount value is too large.
minInputTypeTooLarge: Min input type value is too large.
name: Name
richListLoadFailed: Error: Failed to load rich list. Please refresh the page or try again later.
richListWarning: Rich list data is updated at the beginning of each epoch
smartContractCodeLoadError: Error: Failed to load smart contract code. Please refresh the page or try again later.
smartContractsLoadFailed: Error: Failed to load smart contracts. Please refresh the page or try again later.
startTickTooLarge: Start tick value is too large.
tickCheckFailed: Unable to check tick status. Please try again later.
tickQualityTooltip: Percentage of non-empty ticks this epoch
ticksLoadFailed: Error: Failed to load ticks. Please refresh the page or try again later. If it's Wednesday, please wait until the next epoch begins.
ticksThisEpochTooltip: Total number of ticks processed this epoch and empty ticks count in parentheses
tokenLoadFailed: Error: Failed to load tokens. Please refresh the page or try again later.
unableToDecodeContractInput: Unable to decode this contract input.
virtualTransactionBanner: This is a virtual transaction generated by the Qubic protocol for smart contract lifecycle events.
waitingForTickDesc: This transaction is scheduled for tick {{targetTick}}. It will be available once the network reaches that tick.
waitingForTickTitle: Waiting for tick to be processed
